In the CMS References editor: ability to add/remove artists themselves, and choose which ones appear in the \"featured\" (large grid) vs \"more\" (collapsible list) sections\n2. In the CMS References editor: ability to add/remove companies\n\nThis is similar to the slideshow add/remove functionality we built earlier. The key challenge is:\n- Currently, artists are hardcoded in the PHP arrays in references.php and the CMS editor\n- We need a dynamic system where artists/companies are stored in the DB\n\nLet me think about the approach:\n\n**Artist Management:**\n- Store artists as numbered entries: `artist-1.name`, `artist-1.genre`, `artist-1.desc`, `artist-1.spotify`, `artist-1.featured` (boolean/0/1)\n\n\n- Keep a count field to track how many artists exist, then loop through them on the frontend\n- In the CMS, display all artists with buttons to add or remove them, plus a toggle for featured status\n\n**Company Management:**\n- Store companies similarly as numbered entries with name and type, tracked by a count field\n- Loop through the count on the frontend to display them\n\n**Frontend (references.php):**\n- Featured artists are those marked as \"1\" or \"true\" and display in the grid, while non-featured ones go in the collapsible list\n\nI'm realizing this is a major shift from the current system that uses slugified artist names as keys. Moving to numbered keys will make adding and removing artists much simpler. The user's existing data probably hasn't been entered yet, so switching to this new structure should be fine. Looking at the updated references.php, I can see the user already has 10 featured artists listed including Emergency Gate and Stormhammer, with a separate \"weitere\" section for the rest.\n\nMy approach will be to store a count of total artists in the database, then use numbered keys for each artist's properties (name, genre, description, Spotify link, and featured status). The same pattern applies to companies. References: artists add / remove É"?É"? */\nfunction arAdd() {\n  const inp = document.getElementById('ar-count-inp');\n  if (!inp) return;\n  const max = parseInt(inp.dataset.arMax || '50');\n  let cnt = parseInt(inp.value);\n  if (cnt >= max) return;\n  cnt++;\n  inp.value = cnt;\n  const row = document.querySelector('#ar-list [data-ar-idx=\"' + cnt + '\"]');\n  if (row) row.style.display = '';\n  _arBar(cnt, max);\n  State.dirty['artists.count'] = String(cnt);\n  const box = $b('artists-section');\n  if (box) box.classList.add('is-dirty');\n  updateSaveBar();\n}\nfunction arRemove() {\n  const inp = document.getElementById('ar-count-inp');\n  if (!inp) return;\n  const max = parseInt(inp.dataset.arMax || '50');\n  let cnt = parseInt(inp.value);\n  if (cnt <= 1) return;\n  const row = document.querySelector('#ar-list [data-ar-idx=\"' + cnt + '\"]');\n  if (row) row.style.display = 'none';\n  cnt--;\n  inp.value = cnt;\n  _arBar(cnt, max);\n  State.dirty['artists.count'] = String(cnt);\n  const box = $b('artists-section');\n  if (box) box.classList.add('is-dirty');\n  updateSaveBar();\n}\nfunction _arBar(cnt, max) {\n  const lbl = document.getElementById('ar-bar-lbl');\n  if (lbl) lbl.textContent = cnt + ' K«¨nstler';\n  const btnR = document.getElementById('ar-remove');\n  const btnA = document.getElementById('ar-add');\n  if (btnR) btnR.disabled = (cnt <= 1);\n  if (btnA) btnA.disabled = (cnt >= max);\n}\n\n/* É"?É"? References: companies add / remove É"?É"? */\nfunction coAdd() {\n  const inp = document.getElementById('co-count-inp');\n  if (!inp) return;\n  const max = parseInt(inp.dataset.coMax || '20');\n  let cnt = parseInt(inp.value);\n  if (cnt >= max) return;\n  cnt++;\n  inp.value = cnt;\n  const row = document.querySelector('#co-list [data-co-idx=\"' + cnt + '\"]');\n  if (row) row.style.display = '';\n  _coBar(cnt, max);\n  State.dirty['companies.count'] = String(cnt);\n  const box = $b('companies-section');\n  if (box) box.classList.add('is-dirty');\n  updateSaveBar();\n}\nfunction coRemove() {\n  const inp = document.getElementById('co-count-inp');\n  if (!inp) return;\n  const max = parseInt(inp.dataset.coMax || '20');\n  let cnt = parseInt(inp.value);\n  if (cnt <= 1) return;\n  const row = document.querySelector('#co-list [data-co-idx=\"' + cnt + '\"]');\n  if (row) row.style.display = 'none';\n  cnt--;\n  inp.value = cnt;\n  _coBar(cnt, max);\n  State.dirty['companies.count'] = String(cnt);\n  const box = $b('companies-section');\n  if (box) box.classList.add('is-dirty');\n  updateSaveBar();\n}\nfunction _coBar(cnt, max) {\n  const lbl = document.getElementById('co-bar-lbl');\n  if (lbl) lbl.textContent = cnt + ' Unternehmen';\n  const btnR = document.getElementById('co-remove');\n  const btnA = document.getElementById('co-add');\n  if (btnR) btnR.disabled = (cnt <= 1);\n  if (btnA) btnA.disabled = (cnt >= max);\n}\n```\n\n---\n\n## references.php changes needed:\n\nThe current file has a large hardcoded `$artists` array (lines 23É?"129) and a `$companies` array (lines 131É?"138), plus `$featured` and `$more` filter lines and a `$spotifyPlaylist` line.\n\n### Change 5 É?" References: artists add / remove É"?É"? */\nfunction arAdd() {\n  const inp = document.getElementById('ar-count-inp');\n  if (!inp) return;\n  const max = parseInt(inp.dataset.arMax || '50');\n  let cnt = parseInt(inp.value);\n  if (cnt >= max) return;\n  cnt++;\n  inp.value = cnt;\n  const row = document.querySelector('#ar-list [data-ar-idx=\"' + cnt + '\"]');\n  if (row) row.style.display = '';\n  _arBar(cnt, max);\n  State.dirty['artists.count'] = String(cnt);\n  const box = $b('artists-section');\n  if (box) box.classList.add('is-dirty');\n  updateSaveBar();\n}\nfunction arRemove() {\n  const inp = document.getElementById('ar-count-inp');\n  if (!inp) return;\n  const max = parseInt(inp.dataset.arMax || '50');\n  let cnt = parseInt(inp.value);\n  if (cnt <= 1) return;\n  const row = document.querySelector('#ar-list [data-ar-idx=\"' + cnt + '\"]');\n  if (row) row.style.display = 'none';\n  cnt--;\n  inp.value = cnt;\n  _arBar(cnt, max);\n  State.dirty['artists.count'] = String(cnt);\n  const box = $b('artists-section');\n  if (box) box.classList.add('is-dirty');\n  updateSaveBar();\n}\nfunction _arBar(cnt, max) {\n  const lbl = document.getElementById('ar-bar-lbl');\n  if (lbl) lbl.textContent = cnt + ' K«¨nstler';\n  const btnR = document.getElementById('ar-remove');\n  const btnA = document.getElementById('ar-add');\n  if (btnR) btnR.disabled = (cnt <= 1);\n  if (btnA) btnA.disabled = (cnt >= max);\n}\n\n/* É"?É"? References: companies add / remove É"?É"? */\nfunction coAdd() {\n  const inp = document.getElementById('co-count-inp');\n  if (!inp) return;\n  const max = parseInt(inp.dataset.coMax || '20');\n  let cnt = parseInt(inp.value);\n  if (cnt >= max) return;\n  cnt++;\n  inp.value = cnt;\n  const row = document.querySelector('#co-list [data-co-idx=\"' + cnt + '\"]');\n  if (row) row.style.display = '';\n  _coBar(cnt, max);\n  State.dirty['companies.count'] = String(cnt);\n  const box = $b('companies-section');\n  if (box) box.classList.add('is-dirty');\n  updateSaveBar();\n}\nfunction coRemove() {\n  const inp = document.getElementById('co-count-inp');\n  if (!inp) return;\n  const max = parseInt(inp.dataset.coMax || '20');\n  let cnt = parseInt(inp.value);\n  if (cnt <= 1) return;\n  const row = document.querySelector('#co-list [data-co-idx=\"' + cnt + '\"]');\n  if (row) row.style.display = 'none';\n  cnt--;\n  inp.value = cnt;\n  _coBar(cnt, max);\n  State.dirty['companies.count'] = String(cnt);\n  const box = $b('companies-section');\n  if (box) box.classList.add('is-dirty');\n  updateSaveBar();\n}\nfunction _coBar(cnt, max) {\n  const lbl = document.getElementById('co-bar-lbl');\n  if (lbl) lbl.textContent = cnt + ' Unternehmen';\n  const btnR = document.getElementById('co-remove');\n  const btnA = document.getElementById('co-add');\n  if (btnR) btnR.disabled = (cnt <= 1);\n  if (btnA) btnA.disabled = (cnt >= max);\n}\n```\n\n---\n\n## references.php changes needed:\n\nThe current file has a large hardcoded `$artists` array (lines 23É?"129) and a `$companies` array (lines 131É?"138), plus `$featured` and `$more` filter lines and a `$spotifyPlaylist` line.\n\n### Change 5 É?" Built May 2026.\n\n**Why:** Professional recording studio showcase with CMS for Matthias to manage content himself.\n\n**How to apply:** When working on this project, all paths and patterns below are authoritative.\n\n## Paths\n- XAMPP root: `D:/Eigene Dateien/Wilde_Jungs/xampp/htdocs/maxiworx/`\n- URL base: `/maxiworx/`\n\n## Stack\n- PHP 8.2+ (OOP, PDO, Modular Monolith) É?" no frameworks\n- MySQL 8.x (InnoDB, JSON columns) É?" CMS backend\n- Vanilla JS (ES2024) É?" no frontend frameworks\n- CSS custom properties design system (no Tailwind in production, was considered)\n- GSAP ScrollTrigger for hero animation\n- Google Fonts: Cormorant Garamond (display) + Inter (body)\n\n## Files built (all complete)\n- `index.php` É?" homepage (hero, slideshow, about, contact)\n- `studio.php` É?" room descriptions (Live Room, Control Room, Isolation Booth, Artist Lounge)\n- `equipment.php` É?" gear catalog (SSL 4000E, mics, outboard, monitoring, instruments)\n- `sessions.php` É?" pricing, packages, FAQ accordion\n- `specials.php` É?" 4 split-card specials (personal song, vocal coaching, mobile recording, event)\n- `references.php` É?" artist grid (8 featured + 38 expandable), companies, Spotify banner\n- `booking.php` É?" 4-step booking wizard with fetch to backend\n- `css/design-system.css` É?" full design token system + layout\n- `css/components.css` É?" hamburger, mobile nav, page hero, room cards, booking CTA\n- `js/nav.js` É?" nav scroll effect, hero animation, hamburger, slideshow, scroll reveal\n- `js/i18n.js` É?" DE/EN translation switcher (skips elements with data-cms-key)\n- `includes/nav.php` É?" reusable nav + hamburger + mobile overlay\n- `includes/page-template.php` É?" HTML head + nav include (used by all subpages)\n- `includes/page-footer.php` É?" footer + social links + script tags\n- `php/contact.php` É?" contact form handler (JSON response)\n- `php/booking-submit.php` É?" booking wizard POST handler (JSON response)\n- `cms/includes/cms-content.php` É?" CMS helper functions (cmsContent, c, cRaw, cmsPriceBlock, cmsFlag, cmsMedia)\n\n## Design System\n- Background: #080808 base, fixed parallax layer `.bg-fixed` (z-index: 0)\n- Gold: #C8922A primary, #D4A843 hover\n- Blue CTA only: #3A7BD5\n- Nav: glassmorphism pill, fixed top:16px, becomes `.nav--scrolled` at 40px scroll\n- Hero: MAXIWORX title, letter-spacing 0.20em, clamp(4.5rem, 13vw, 10rem)\n- All sections use `position: relative; z-index: 10` to float above fixed BG\n\n## Key architecture notes\n- `index.php` is standalone (has its own inline nav/footer styles, does NOT use page-template.php)\n- All subpages use `require 'includes/page-template.php'` pattern\n- CMS require must come BEFORE page-template require in pages that use it (sessions.php fixed)\n- `nav.js` adds class `nav--scrolled` (not BEM `site-nav--scrolled`) É?" design-system.css updated to match\n- i18n.js skips elements with `data-cms-key` attribute to avoid overwriting CMS content\n- Slideshow captions use `data-caption-de` and `data-caption-en` data attributes\n\n## CMS (Phase 2 planned)\n- Feature flags: `show_prices`, `show_faq` stored in `cms_settings` table\n- Content editable via `cms/` admin panel\n- `cmsPriceBlock($c, 'recording', $lang)` renders price or \"auf Anfrage\" based on DB flag\n","numLines":64,"startLine":1,"totalLines":64}},"sourceToolAssistantUUID":"8d3f6cfa-9610-4099-9ef3-85b8566d3d73","userType":"external","entrypoint":"claude-desktop","cwd":"D:\\Eigene Dateien\\Webseiten\\Maxiworx","sessionId":"2e350e32-d047-4c3c-9c1f-750e1c6b4c25","version":"2.1.138","gitBranch":"HEAD","slug":"reactive-cuddling-snail"}
